pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 using the modern 'release' flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against JDK 21 APIs and bytecode; using source/target 17 would result in incompatible class files or missing API access on a JDK 21 runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok dependency to enable annotation processing for boilerplate reduction.
Remove JaCoCo Maven plugin configuration from the build.
Bump project version from SNAPSHOT to release version.

Extract argument parsing into a method that returns an Options object instead of populating static fields.

private static void parseArgs(String[] args) {
        // ... populates static fields FILES, isShortStat, etc ...
src/main/java/util/Main.java.after:

src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to file reading and math operations that are no longer used in Main.
Remove static state fields that were moved into the Options object or removed.
Replace direct System.out.println calls with calls to a new PrintUtils utility class.

Remove file reading logic (initInputList) as it is likely moved to CoreLogic or handled differently.
Remove file writing logic (write) as it is likely moved to CoreLogic.
Remove help printing logic as it is moved to PrintUtils.
Remove string type definition logic as it is moved to CoreLogic.

Refactor string length fields to use Lombok annotations.
Refactor count fields to use Lombok annotations and change visibility.
